raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the 10 cm grasp limit of the claw, its front side is fully accessible, and the right arm has an unobstructed path to approach from the front.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is firmly held by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, freeing the area in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_far_right_area",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the far-right region of the tabletop is empty and large enough to accommodate the cup without risk of collision.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is safely placed on the far-right side of the table and released; the right arm is free."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been removed, leaving the front face of box_2 unobstructed; there is at least 15 cm of free table space in front of box_2 to slide it forward without colliding with other objects or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is slid forward, creating a clear gap (>10 cm) between the right side of box_1 and the left side of box_2; both lateral faces of box_1 are now accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left and right sides of box_1 are free of obstructions; both arms can align laterally with sufficient clearance above and beside the box to engage simultaneously without using the claws.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly secured between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up of the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the 10 cm grasp limit of the claw, its front side is fully accessible, and the right arm has an unobstructed path to approach from the front.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is firmly held by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, freeing the area in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the far-right region of the tabletop is empty and large enough to accommodate the cup without risk of collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is safely placed on the far-right side of the table and released; the right arm is free.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been removed, leaving the front face of box_2 unobstructed; there is at least 15 cm of free table space in front of box_2 to slide it forward without colliding with other objects or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is slid forward, creating a clear gap (>10 cm) between the right side of box_1 and the left side of box_2; both lateral faces of box_1 are now accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left and right sides of box_1 are free of obstructions; both arms can align laterally with sufficient clearance above and beside the box to engage simultaneously without using the claws.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly secured between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up of the darker box.
